title: harvest_file_v1 — manifest contract for harvesting a relatedness-atlas layer file
description: Validates POST /api/actions when type='harvest_file'. Resolves a layer_key (declared in layers.registry.json with source=file + source_file) through the files.registry.json path_template, copies the matched file into raw_results/relatedness/{action_id}/, and dispatches to the matching typed extractor.

layer_key.description: A key declared in atlases/relatedness/registries/data/layers.registry.json with source=file.

args.description: Template-fill args for the file's path_template. Most layers have no placeholders; included for forward compatibility.

params.description: Optional extractor params (override defaults declared in extractors.registry.json).
